meaning: v.古罗马化,用罗马字书写 vt 使罗马化
examples: Do you know how to romanize your name?
To transliterate into the characters of the Latin alphabet; Romanize.
Most database (including FirstSearch) either omit punctuation altogether or Romanize it to standard keyboard characters.
When someone tries to criticise the Gaullist village, they are not really trying to improve it, they are trying to infiltrate or besiege it or romanize - that is, anglicize - it.
